task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Colonial Home in Greenwich CT (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $4950000.00 and wholesale is $3960000.00. Product features: 6-bedroom colonial with tennis court and pool on 2 acres. Reference: https://www.sothebysrealty.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Colonial Home in Greenwich CT. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Colonial Home in Greenwich CT. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
